metadata.name: Prepare the Statement of Cash Flows

description: Using the indirect method, an accountant needs to prepare the statement of cash flows for the quarter.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the income statement for the quarter and the balance sheets from the beginning and end of the quarter.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all the necessary financial statements.

nodes.task_description: Start with net income and adjust for non-cash items like depreciation and amortization.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly adjusts net income for non-cash expenses.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the changes in working capital accounts (e.g., AR, AP, Inventory) to determine cash flow from operations.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly calculates the net change in working capital.

nodes.task_description: Analyze changes in long-term assets and liabilities to determine cash flow from investing and financing activities and generate the final statement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a complete and accurate statement of cash flows.
